name: hospital-management-system
description: Hospital Management System - Full Stack MERN Application

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w dashboard"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w dashboard
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install -w backend && npm install -w frontend && npm install -w dashboard
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w dashboard
